safety_notes: This primitive produces non-flight reference geometry only. Not airworthy, not certified, not for manufacturing.
Rim slot multi-stage profile with 3 stations (depth=12/8/4mm, half_width=4/5.5/7mm) exceeds the primitive's single-stage slot parameterisation; slot geometry will be approximated.
Front hub annular seal grooves at specific diameters (200-210mm, 220-230mm) are not directly parameterised by seal_land_start_dia/pitch; use annular details parameters if needed.
Global 1.5mm chamfer approximated via edge_chamfer_mm parameter.
All geometry is reference only — trust_level=reference_geometry.
